bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 7 day(s) · scope=morning-brief-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 0 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 跟踪综合毛利率、电力收入增速等核心变量

DONE

需要跟踪综合毛利率、电力及相关产品收入增速、投资收益、财务费用和归母净利润占净利润比例的变化，这些是预测的核心变量（见报告第七部分：结论）。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 跟踪年度分红落地情况

DONE

跟踪权益分派实施公告、股权登记日、除权除息日。依据：§四 跟踪项 - 分红落地。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 监控煤价和库存变动对利润的影响

DONE

若煤价上行快于电价和容量补偿，需关注火电毛利承压风险。依据：§四 跟踪项 - 煤价和库存。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 监测迎峰度夏负荷及电力供需

DONE

跟踪安徽负荷、火电利用小时、现货价差和跨区受电情况。依据：§四 跟踪项 - 迎峰度夏负荷。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 跟踪新能源项目投产进度

DONE

跟踪并网公告、固定资产转固、发电量和补贴/绿证/绿电交易收益。依据：§四 跟踪项 - 新能源项目投产。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 确认新能公司并表落地情况

DONE

对比半年报少数股东权益、投资收益、营业收入和新能源分部信息，确认增量是否进入表内。依据：§四 跟踪项 - 新能公司并表。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 跟踪2026年半年报披露情况

DONE

重点关注新能公司并表范围、归母净利润、经营现金流、煤炭成本、在建工程和新能源装机进度，验证二季度修复情况。依据：§四 跟踪项 - 2026年半年度报告。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 监控年度压力测试后资本回报

DONE

观察压力测试后回购节奏、CET1 缓冲及监管资本要求变化。参考 §VI [S4]。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 验证 2Q26 业绩关键指标

DONE

重点关注 Services 存款、Markets 收入、Banking 费池及 USCC 信用成本。参考 §VI [S8]。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 验证季度股息上调执行

DONE

确认自 2026 年第三季度起将季度普通股股息从 0.60 美元提高至 0.67 美元的计划。参考 §II [S4]。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 跟踪 AA 联名卡迁移质量

DONE

检查 American Airlines 联名卡迁移中的客户留存、消费额及信用成本风险。参考 §VI。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-19 · [research_task] 监控 Markets 收入正常化

DONE

观察 2Q26/3Q26 Markets 收入是否出现显著环比/同比回落。参考 §III。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed
